headline: Bruins trail Buffalo while Red Sox bullpen collapses against the Yankees
morning_brew: Are you kidding me with this? The Bruins head back to the Garden and let the Sabres walk away with a 3-1 win to take a 2-1 series lead. Jeremy Swayman did his part with 25 saves, but Tanner Jeannot was the only guy who could find the back of the net in the second period. You cannot win playoff games scoring one goal, I do not care who is standing in the crease. Absolutely brutal to drop that one on home ice when the series was right there for the taking.

Then you look over at Fenway Park and it is more of the same frustration. The Sox are now 9-16 after a 4-2 loss to the Yankees. Tolle was throwing absolute gas out there, fanning 11 hitters in six innings of work, and the bullpen just hands the game over on a silver platter. Danny Coulombe gets tagged for three runs in less than an inning and the losing streak is at three. Losing to the Pinstripes at the oldest yard in baseball is a tough pill to swallow for any townie.

We have the Celtics heading into Philly tonight for a massive playoff matchup, and honestly, we need them to show some life because the rest of the Hub is struggling right now. On the football side, Mike Reiss is wrapping up the first round of the draft, so at least there is some hope for the future. It is a busy morning on the phones, but watching the Sox and Bruins both trip up on the same night is a total disastah.

trend_watch.trend: Fanned 11 batters over 6.0 innings with only one earned run
trend_watch.dans_take: The kid was electric out there against the New York bats, it is a shame the relief corps couldn't hold the lead for him.

trend_watch.trend: Surrendered 3 earned runs on 3 hits in just 0.2 innings of work
trend_watch.dans_take: You come in for a high-leverage spot and get hit like that? Absolutely brutal performance from a guy we need to be steady.

trend_watch.trend: Went 0-for-4 in the loss to the Yankees
trend_watch.dans_take: We need the big bats at the top of the order to actually produce if we are going to climb out of this 9-16 hole.

news_digest.headline: Sabres rally to beat Bruins 3-1, take 2-1 lead in NHL playoff series
news_digest.dans_take: A third-period collapse at home is exactly how you find yourself shaking hands early in the postseason.

news_digest.headline: Patriots' Round 1 Wrap Up
news_digest.dans_take: Glad to see the draft moving along, let's hope these new additions can actually move the chains.

news_digest.headline: Red Sox take 3-game losing streak into matchup against the Orioles
news_digest.dans_take: Heading to Baltimore while sliding down the standings is a recipe for a wicked long weekend.
